queries.sql: select `attributes`.* from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` inner join `attribute_groups` on `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = `attribute_groups`.`id` inner join `attribute_families` on `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` = `attribute_families`.`id` where `attribute_families`.`id` = 1

select `attributes`.* from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` inner join `attribute_groups` on `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = `attribute_groups`.`id` inner join `attribute_families` on `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` = `attribute_families`.`id` where `attribute_families`.`id` = 1 and `attributes`.`is_visible_on_front` = 1
select * from `attribute_translations` where `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` = 25 and `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` is not null

select * from `categories` where exists (select * from `category_translations` where `categories`.`id` = `category_translations`.`category_id` and `category_translations`.`slug` = 'arctic-cozy-knit-unisex-beanie') limit 1

select `locales`.*, `channel_locales`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_locales`.`locale_id` as `pivot_locale_id` from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1

select `currencies`.*, `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` as `pivot_currency_id` from `currencies` inner join `channel_currencies` on `currencies`.`id` = `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` where `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `currencies` inner join `channel_currencies` on `currencies`.`id` = `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` where `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` = 1

select `locales`.*, `channel_locales`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_locales`.`locale_id` as `pivot_locale_id` from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1 order by `name` asc
select count(*) as aggregate from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `currencies` inner join `channel_currencies` on `currencies`.`id` = `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` where `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` = 1
select * from `product_attribute_values` where `product_attribute_values`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_attribute_values`.`product_id` is not null
select * from `product_flat` where `product_id` = 1 and `channel` = 'default' and `locale` = 'en' and `parent_id` is null limit 1
select * from `product_reviews` where `product_reviews`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_reviews`.`product_id` is not null
select * from `product_reviews` where `product_reviews`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_reviews`.`product_id` is not null and `status` = 'approved' order by `created_at` desc limit 50

select `products`.*, `product_relations`.`parent_id` as `pivot_parent_id`, `product_relations`.`child_id` as `pivot_child_id` from `products` inner join `product_relations` on `products`.`id` = `product_relations`.`child_id` where `product_relations`.`parent_id` = 1 and exists (select * from `product_flat` where `products`.`id` = `product_flat`.`product_id` and `channel` = 'default' and `locale` = 'en' and `status` = 1 and `visible_individually` = 1) limit 12
select * from `product_images` where `product_images`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_images`.`product_id` is not null order by `position` asc
select * from `product_videos` where `product_videos`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_videos`.`product_id` is not null order by `position` asc
select * from `product_price_indices` where `product_price_indices`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_price_indices`.`product_id` is not null

select * from `product_customer_group_prices` where `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` is not null and (`customer_group_id` = 2 or `customer_group_id` is null) and `qty` > 1 group by `qty` order by `qty` asc
select * from `product_customer_group_prices` where `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` is not null

select * from `product_customer_group_prices` where `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` is not null and (`customer_group_id` = 2 or `customer_group_id` is null) and `qty` > 1 group by `qty` order by `qty` asc
select * from `product_attribute_values` where `product_attribute_values`.`product_id` = 4 and `product_attribute_values`.`product_id` is not null
select * from `product_images` where `product_images`.`product_id` = 4 and `product_images`.`product_id` is not null order by `position` asc
select * from `product_price_indices` where `product_price_indices`.`product_id` = 4 and `product_price_indices`.`product_id` is not null
select * from `theme_customizations` where `type` = 'services_content' and `status` = 1 and `theme_code` = 'default' and `channel_id` = 1
select * from `theme_customizations` where `type` = 'footer_links' and `status` = 1 and `theme_code` = 'default' and `channel_id` = 1

statements.sql: select `locales`.*, `channel_locales`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_locales`.`locale_id` as `pivot_locale_id` from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1

select `currencies`.*, `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` as `pivot_currency_id` from `currencies` inner join `channel_currencies` on `currencies`.`id` = `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` where `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` = 1

select * from `categories` where exists (select * from `category_translations` where `categories`.`id` = `category_translations`.`category_id` and `category_translations`.`slug` = 'arctic-cozy-knit-unisex-beanie') limit 1

select `attributes`.* from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` inner join `attribute_groups` on `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = `attribute_groups`.`id` inner join `attribute_families` on `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` = `attribute_families`.`id` where `attribute_families`.`id` = 1
select * from `product_attribute_values` where `product_attribute_values`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_attribute_values`.`product_id` is not null
select * from `product_flat` where `product_id` = 1 and `channel` = 'default' and `locale` = 'en' and `parent_id` is null limit 1
select * from `product_reviews` where `product_reviews`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_reviews`.`product_id` is not null

select `attributes`.* from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` inner join `attribute_groups` on `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = `attribute_groups`.`id` inner join `attribute_families` on `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` = `attribute_families`.`id` where `attribute_families`.`id` = 1 and `attributes`.`is_visible_on_front` = 1
select * from `attribute_translations` where `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` = 25 and `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` is not null
select * from `product_reviews` where `product_reviews`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_reviews`.`product_id` is not null and `status` = 'approved' order by `created_at` desc limit 50

select `products`.*, `product_relations`.`parent_id` as `pivot_parent_id`, `product_relations`.`child_id` as `pivot_child_id` from `products` inner join `product_relations` on `products`.`id` = `product_relations`.`child_id` where `product_relations`.`parent_id` = 1 and exists (select * from `product_flat` where `products`.`id` = `product_flat`.`product_id` and `channel` = 'default' and `locale` = 'en' and `status` = 1 and `visible_individually` = 1) limit 12
select * from `product_images` where `product_images`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_images`.`product_id` is not null order by `position` asc
select * from `product_videos` where `product_videos`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_videos`.`product_id` is not null order by `position` asc
select * from `product_price_indices` where `product_price_indices`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_price_indices`.`product_id` is not null

select * from `product_customer_group_prices` where `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` is not null and (`customer_group_id` = 2 or `customer_group_id` is null) and `qty` > 1 group by `qty` order by `qty` asc
select * from `product_customer_group_prices` where `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` is not null

select * from `product_customer_group_prices` where `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` = 1 and `product_customer_group_prices`.`product_id` is not null and (`customer_group_id` = 2 or `customer_group_id` is null) and `qty` > 1 group by `qty` order by `qty` asc
select * from `product_attribute_values` where `product_attribute_values`.`product_id` = 4 and `product_attribute_values`.`product_id` is not null
select * from `product_images` where `product_images`.`product_id` = 4 and `product_images`.`product_id` is not null order by `position` asc
select * from `product_price_indices` where `product_price_indices`.`product_id` = 4 and `product_price_indices`.`product_id` is not null
select count(*) as aggregate from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `currencies` inner join `channel_currencies` on `currencies`.`id` = `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` where `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` = 1

select `locales`.*, `channel_locales`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_locales`.`locale_id` as `pivot_locale_id` from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1 order by `name` asc
select count(*) as aggregate from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `currencies` inner join `channel_currencies` on `currencies`.`id` = `channel_currencies`.`currency_id` where `channel_currencies`.`channel_id` = 1
select * from `theme_customizations` where `type` = 'services_content' and `status` = 1 and `theme_code` = 'default' and `channel_id` = 1
select * from `theme_customizations` where `type` = 'footer_links' and `status` = 1 and `theme_code` = 'default' and `channel_id` = 1
